# diagramkit

> Diagram rendering CLI & library. Converts .mermaid, .excalidraw, and .drawio files to SVG/PNG/JPEG/WebP with automatic light/dark mode support.

## Quick Start

npm install diagramkit playwright mermaid
npx playwright install chromium
diagramkit render .

## Supported Formats

Input: .mermaid (.mmd, .mmdc), .excalidraw, .drawio (.drawio.xml, .dio)
Output: SVG (default), PNG, JPEG, WebP

## CLI

diagramkit render <file-or-dir> [--format svg|png|jpeg|webp] [--theme light|dark|both] [--watch] [--force]
diagramkit render <file-or-dir> [--scale <number>] [--quality <number>] [--no-contrast] [--type <type>] [--output <dir>]
diagramkit warmup

## Output Convention

Rendered images go to .diagrams/ next to source files:
  source.mermaid -> .diagrams/source-light.svg + .diagrams/source-dark.svg

## JS API

import { render, renderFile, renderAll, watchDiagrams, convertSvg, loadConfig, warmup, dispose } from 'diagramkit'

render(source: string, type: DiagramType, options?: RenderOptions): Promise<RenderResult>
renderFile(filePath: string, options?: RenderOptions): Promise<RenderResult>
renderAll(options?: BatchOptions): Promise<void>
watchDiagrams(options: WatchOptions): () => void
convertSvg(svg: Buffer | string, options: ConvertOptions): Promise<Buffer>
loadConfig(overrides?: Partial<DiagramkitConfig>, dir?: string): DiagramkitConfig

## Configuration

Config file: .diagramkitrc.json (walks up directory tree)
Global config: ~/.config/diagramkit/config.json
Merge order: defaults -> global -> local -> overrides

## Dependencies

Required: playwright, mermaid
Optional: @excalidraw/excalidraw + react + react-dom (for .excalidraw), sharp (for PNG/JPEG/WebP)

## Links

- API Types: src/types.ts
- CLI: cli/bin.ts
- Docs: docs/
- Skills: skills/claude-code/diagramkit.md
